turns.name: Discover scope
turns.user: Discover AD scope for this run and list reachable DCs.

turns.name: AD replication baseline
turns.user: Run replication baseline first and identify most impacted DCs with strongest AD evidence.

turns.name: EventLog correlation pass
turns.user: Correlate impacted DCs with Directory Service/System event evidence in the same UTC window.

turns.name: Continue all remaining DCs
turns.user: Continue AD + EventLog correlation for all remaining discovered DCs in this same turn. Do not stop after first failure.

turns.name: Recovery continuation contract
turns.user: If this pass was interrupted, continue from already collected evidence and avoid rerunning identical successful host queries.

turns.name: Retry only failed targets once
turns.user: Retry only failed or unreachable targets once with narrower scope, then continue with remaining hosts.

turns.name: Cross-DC AD+Event matrix
turns.user: Return per-DC matrix with replication state, event evidence present/missing, earliest UTC, latest UTC, confidence.

turns.name: Root cause families
turns.user: Classify likely root-cause families with confidence and strongest supporting AD/Event evidence.

turns.name: Execute-now checklist
turns.user: Provide a prioritized 30-minute execute-now validation checklist with no follow-up questions.

turns.name: Final compact summary
turns.user: Summarize in 6 bullets with UTC markers, DC coverage count, unresolved blockers, and rerun trigger.
